codeReview.summary: Commit e2c1a1c is a scoped test-surface accumulation for this feature: it updates only core/tests/integration_db.rs and adds/retains alias-foreign regressions covering both direct #[table_as(...)] foreign roundtrip and nested alias models that themselves own #[foreign] fields across save/get/get_record/list/list_limit, with raw-row assertions proving target-table RecordId storage for both alias rows and holder rows. The reviewed implementation satisfies the feature contract because the runtime behavior was already landed in prior hydrate-roundtrip commits and this feature commit correctly captures the missing milestone test surface without introducing unrelated implementation changes.

summary: Pass. I reviewed the feature metadata, worker handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit e2c1a1c. The commit is limited to the shared integration regression file and the covered alias-roundtrip tests satisfy the feature contract, including nested alias hydration and raw RecordId storage expectations through the target table.
